findings.title: API key hardcoded in source code
findings.evidence: The raw git diff shows a new line adding `apiKey: "sk-abcdefghijklmnop"` to the provider object in src/provider.ts. This is a plaintext API key committed to version control, which violates fundamental secrets management practices. The key format (sk-* prefix) is typical of API tokens and should never be in source code.

notes: Diff Drift report correctly identified the high-severity hardcoded secret flag.
The raw diff confirms the exact addition reported: a literal API key string being added to the provider configuration.
Only one file was analyzed and contains the active flag.
No mitigating context in the diff suggests this is intentional or safe (e.g., a redacted example, placeholder, or test-only constant).

evaluator.note: Benchmark v4 multi-model panel; blind, packet-only context.
